overall.description: First-person walking footage through a sunny urban residential neighborhood in GTA V (Los Santos), featuring palm-lined streets, graffiti-covered buildings, scattered pedestrians, and light vehicle traffic. The clip transitions from a commercial block with brick buildings to a residential area with single-family homes.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with graffiti-covered brick buildings

events.description: white sedan drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to brick industrial buildings covered in colorful graffiti

entered.detail: two-story brick building with large red and purple graffiti tags
row of tall palm trees lining the street edge
yellow fire hydrant on the grass verge between sidewalk and street
wooden utility pole with power lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person walk along a sunlit urban sidewalk. A brick building covered in red graffiti dominates the right side, while palm trees line the left. The camera passes a yellow fire hydrant and utility poles as a white car drives by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with commercial buildings visible across the road

events.description: exits the covered building line into an open street intersection
crossing the asphalt street while observing traffic and pedestrians ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while observing a pedestrian in red ahead and commercial buildings in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and dark pants crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: yellow commercial building with storefront signs and a large rooftop billboard
large advertising billboard mounted on top of the commercial building
tall white concrete wall running along the sidewalk with graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the building line into a wide intersection, crossing the asphalt street toward a yellow commercial building with a large billboard. A pedestrian in red crosses ahead, and the camera passes onto a sidewalk bordered by a white concrete wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with single-family homes and chain-link fences

events.description: encountering two people sitting on a low brick wall on the right side
slight path adjustment to walk around a dog standing on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the residential sidewalk passing various pedestrians, real estate signs, and a dog on the path

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a low brick wall conversing, one in white shirt and one in yellow top
medium-sized black dog standing on the sidewalk before walking away

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence with brick pillars enclosing residential properties
green and white Johnson Real Estate for-sale sign
wooden foreclosure for-sale sign with red and blue text
single-story suburban house with tiled roof and front yard

segments.scene_description: Walking through a residential neighborhood with palm trees and chain-link fences. The camera passes two people sitting on a brick wall, a green real estate sign, and navigates around a dog on the sidewalk. Foreclosure signs and single-story homes line the street as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street intersection with stop sign and corner store

events.description: approaching the intersection corner and stopping briefly before the stop sign
crossing the street as a brown SUV drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for vehicles to pass, then crossing to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: brown SUV driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on wooden pole at the street corner
blue municipal recycling bin on the sidewalk corner
small commercial building with red garage door at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a residential intersection marked by a red stop sign. After waiting for a brown SUV to pass, the camera crosses the asphalt street. Blue trash bins and a corner building with a red garage door come into view as the walk continues into the next residential block.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a graffiti-marked commercial block into a quiet, sun-drenched residential neighborhood. It begins along a sidewalk beside a red-graffitied brick building and palm trees, passing a yellow fire hydrant as a white car drives by. As the camera exits the building line, it crosses a wide intersection toward a yellow commercial building with a large billboard, moving past a pedestrian in red and along a white concrete wall. The scene then shifts into a residential area characterized by chain-link fences and single-story homes, where the camera navigates around a dog and passes people resting on a brick wall. Finally, after pausing for a brown SUV at a red stop sign, the camera crosses the asphalt street toward blue trash bins and a building with a red garage door.
